nasb.text: But the father said to his slaves, ‘Quickly bring out the best robe and put it on him, and put a ring on his hand and sandals on his feet;

esv.text: But the father said to his servants,  ‘Bring quickly the best robe, and put it on him, and put a ring on his hand, and shoes on his feet.

cnv.text: 父親卻吩咐僕人說：‘快把那最好的袍子拿來給他穿，把戒指戴在他手上，把鞋穿在他腳上，

ccb.text: “父亲却对奴仆说，‘赶快拿最好的袍子来给他穿上，给他戴上戒指，穿上鞋，

csbs.text: “父亲却对奴仆们说：‘赶快    把那最好的袍子拿来给他穿上，把戒指戴在他手上，把鞋子穿在他脚上，
